common.companyBadge: Digital security and IT advisory for businesses in Norway

home.heroTitle: Digital security, structure, and control across your IT environment
home.heroSubtitle: We help small and large organizations strengthen protection for users, devices, and data—with Microsoft Defender, robust device management, and secure digital collaboration. The aim is straightforward, auditable, scalable security with room for ongoing risk review and follow-up.
home.foundationBody: SecCloudPath can also support businesses from day one by establishing digital foundations where security is built in from the start—not bolted on as an afterthought.
foundationPoints: Microsoft 365 setup with a security baseline
Endpoint protection and safe collaboration from day one

value.devicesDesc: Strong protection for PCs, laptops, and mobile devices—with MDM, policies, and Microsoft Defender so devices stay updated, encrypted, and aligned with policy.
value.securityTitle: Security that works as a system
value.securityDesc: Identity, Defender, network, and data working together—modern controls that reduce risk without paralyzing day-to-day work.
value.usersDesc: Make onboarding, access changes, and offboarding predictable: MFA, Conditional Access, and clear roles that support secure collaboration.
value.scaleDesc: Build IT and security that grows with the business—from small teams to larger organizations—without rebuilding everything from scratch.
value.monitoringDesc: Alerts, light routines, and steady upkeep of policy and compliance—so issues are caught early and documented.
value.standardsDesc: Shared practices for access, devices, collaboration, and setup—simpler operations, fewer deviations, and better compliance over time.

home.whyLead: When digital security is structured, IT becomes something you govern—not only react to when incidents occur.
home.whyBody: With coordinated management of users, devices, Microsoft Defender, and collaboration surfaces, you reduce risk and gain clarity on who has access to what—and how data is shared. That makes it easier to collaborate safely and to follow up continuously so gaps and changes do not linger.

whyPoints.riskDesc: Clear access rules, consistent endpoint security, and controlled sharing.
whyPoints.timeDesc: Fewer manual exceptions and less time spent on insecure workarounds.
whyPoints.controlDesc: Visibility for leadership and operations, simpler audits, and more predictable change.

home.ctaBody: Get in touch for an informal conversation. We will help you assess risk and propose concrete next steps—tailored to both small and large organizations.

services.title: Services
services.intro: SecCloudPath helps organizations build auditable, secure IT environments—from Microsoft Defender and device management to secure digital collaboration and general advisory on digital security. The goal is clear protection for data and users—with less friction in daily work.
services.ctaBody: We will help you prioritize security improvements that matter most and outline practical next steps.

items.iamDesc: Make access predictable and secure—so the right people can work and collaborate without unnecessary exposure of data.
iamBullets: Secure access to systems, cloud, and collaboration tools
items.mdmDesc: Keep PCs, laptops, and mobile devices secure and compliant—with management, updates, and protection wherever people work.
mdmBullets: Security policies, encryption, and configuration hardening
Integration with Microsoft Defender for Endpoint
items.msDesc: Structured rollout of Microsoft 365, Entra, and the security stack—with emphasis on Defender, identity, and practical long-term operations.
msBullets: Microsoft 365 and Teams in a secure context
Microsoft Defender for Endpoint (AV, EDR, hardening)
Intune, Entra ID, and security baselines
Optimization and best practices for SMBs and larger environments
items.collabDesc: Let employees work effectively in Teams, SharePoint, and the cloud—with clear rules for sharing, guest access, and protection of sensitive information.
collabBullets: Safe use of Teams and sharing channels
Governance of external sharing and guest access
Data classification and DLP where it adds value
Awareness and practical routines for secure collaboration
items.groundworkDesc: Combined support for organizations that need practical digital security guidance and a secure baseline from day one—scalable for small and large teams.
groundworkBullets: Risk assessment and prioritization of security improvements
Guidance tailored to size, industry, and maturity
Website and business account setup where needed
Microsoft 365 with security in mind from the start
Core tools and long-term structure for digital operations
Auditable solutions that grow with the business
items.securityMonitoringDesc: Ongoing follow-up on alerts and signals from Defender and the platform—to detect and handle events early.
securityMonitoringBullets: Monitoring of devices, identity, and email
Triage and follow-up on Microsoft Defender alerts
Foundational threat protection and incident prioritization

about.badge: Digital security and IT advisory for businesses in Norway
about.title: About SecCloudPath
about.intro: SecCloudPath helps organizations build secure, structured, modern IT environments—with emphasis on the Microsoft platform, Defender, and practical protection for users, devices, and data. We work with both small and larger organizations that want real digital security without unnecessary complexity.
about.cardBody1: We work with businesses that want stronger security and better control over users and devices—without IT and security becoming a permanent crisis project.
about.cardBody2: The result is an environment that is safer to collaborate in, easier to operate, and better prepared for threats and change.
about.approachIntro: We prioritize concrete security outcomes and clear structure: the right protections first—then scalable patterns and continuous improvement.

pillars.practicalDesc: Clear steps, minimal disruption, and controls that make day-to-day operations noticeably safer.
pillars.securityDesc: Defender, access control, and secure collaboration aligned with how people actually work.
pillars.structureDesc: Consistent standards for users, devices, and data—less sprawl and fewer vulnerabilities over time.
pillars.scaleDesc: A security architecture that supports growth, new hires, and new requirements—from SMBs to larger organizations.

about.partnerTitle: A reliable partner for digital security
about.partnerBody1: You get clear guidance, documentation you can trust, and an environment built for both steady operations and incidents.
about.partnerBody2: Whether you are establishing security from scratch or improving an existing setup, we focus on lasting value and measurable risk reduction.

contact.badge: Let’s talk about security and your IT needs
contact.title: Contact us
contact.intro: If you want stronger digital security and better structure on the Microsoft platform, we would be happy to help. Send a message and we will get back to you for an informal conversation.
